provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Inquests (Coroners' Remuneration) Regulations.

provisions.title: Fees and allowances
provisions.content: Every coroner, other than a magistrate, shall, when attending to business connected with proceedings in a coroner's court be entitled to be paid his travelling expenses and allowances for accommodation in accordance with the provisions of the Criminal Proceedings (Expenses of Assessors and Witnesses) Rules 1 . 1 G.N. No. 352 of 1964

provisions.title: Professional fee
provisions.content: In addition to fees and allowances payable under paragraph 2, a Coroner shall be paid a fee of one hundred shillings in respect of each inquest which he conducts and concludes in accordance with the provisions of the Inquests Act.
